images.altText: Luxury cruise ship Mardi Gras sailing in Baltic Sea
Mardi Gras cruise ship deck view and design
Balcony stateroom cabin on board Mardi Gras
Gourmet fine dining restaurant onboard cruise ship
Main resort-style swimming pool on the ship deck

reviews.author: Guest Traveler 1
reviews.title: Will cruise again
reviews.body: Outstanding itineraries and beautiful scenery. Dining was a culinary highlight every single night. Slipped off to 30-Night Baltic Sea Capitals Explorer and had a fantastic time.

reviews.author: Guest Traveler 2
reviews.title: Fantastic value
reviews.body: Refined atmosphere, excellent service, and beautiful ship design. Excursion slots filled up quickly, so book early. Slipped off to 30-Night Baltic Sea Capitals Explorer and had a fantastic time.

reviews.author: Guest Traveler 3
reviews.title: Perfect Getaway
reviews.body: Dining options were amazing. Specialty restaurants were worth the cover charge. The theater shows were Broadway quality. Slipped off to 30-Night Baltic Sea Capitals Explorer and had a fantastic time.

reviews.author: Guest Traveler 4
reviews.title: Fantastic value
reviews.body: The ship was clean and well maintained. Wi-Fi was a bit slow in remote areas, but overall a great value cruise. Slipped off to 30-Night Baltic Sea Capitals Explorer and had a fantastic time.

reviews.author: Guest Traveler 5
reviews.title: Unbelievable Cruise!
reviews.body: Absolutely loved the balcony cabin and the service was top notch! The excursions in ports of call were well organized. Slipped off to 30-Night Baltic Sea Capitals Explorer and had a fantastic time.

seo.title: 30-Night Baltic Sea Capitals Explorer | Mardi Gras | Carnival Cruise Line
